== Notes for [[Item:Q82937|Q82937]] ==

Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus Orfitus was a Roman senator and a consul of Rome in the year 51.[1]

He was named consul ordinarius in the year 51 as a colleague of the emperor Claudius I.[2] From 62-63, he was named proconsul of the Province of Africa by order of the emperor Nero.

After his mandate in Africa finished, he fell into disgrace around the year 66 and was accused of being a traitor to the emperor Nero in the senate by Marcus Aquilius Regulus. He was found guilty and executed.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Servius_Cornelius_Scipio_Salvidienus_Orfitus_(consul_51)
---------------------------------

ID: I84729

Name: Servius Cornelius Salvidienus

Given Name: Servius Cornelius

Surname: Salvidienus

Sex: M

_UID: 0BE8CBC0A700174B923D24D7BE777B1E1F36

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: Servius Cornelius Servius Salvidienus

Mother: Cornelia Cethegilla

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84729
--------------------
ID: I84709

Name: Servius Cornelius Gnaeus Lentulus

Given Name: Servius Cornelius Gnaeus

Surname: Lentulus

Sex: M

_UID: B4393B4C9C5CD74D8D01CF91F019676E5C71

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 30 BC

Death: 23

Father: Gnaeus Cornelius Gnaeus Lentulus b: ABT 60 BC

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Servius Cornelius Servius Lentulus b: ABT 10 BC

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84709

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
